package rulefixtures

import (
	"hash/adler32"
)

// scenario for adler32_checksum_in_loop: `adler32.Checksum(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario436Positive(chunks [][]byte) uint32 {
	var total uint32
	for _, payload := range chunks {
		total += adler32.Checksum(payload)
	}
	return total
}
